headline: Malaysia Blockchain Trade Platform Processes RM8.5 Billion
context: National blockchain-based trade finance platform processed RM8.5 billion in cross-border transactions in its first full year.

cards.big: Blockchain trade platform processed RM8.5 billion in first full year
cards.sub: System reduces letter of credit processing from 5 days to 4 hours

cards.big: 28 Malaysian banks and 12 foreign banks connected to the platform
cards.sub: SME exporters saved RM280 million in reduced documentation costs

cards.big: System handles trade with 18 countries across ASEAN and Middle East
cards.sub: Each transaction creates immutable audit trail reducing fraud by 85%

cards.big: BNM developed platform with 4 central banks under Project Nexus
cards.sub: Interoperability with Singapore and Thailand platforms achieved in 2025

cards.big: Blockchain trade tests whether distributed technology can reduce real costs in traditional commerce
RM8.5 billion blockchain trade processing. Distributed ledger adoption depends on interoperability, not isolated platforms.
